logos.asset_variant: Standalone solid-colour mark for light backgrounds
logos.redistribution: Cached locally; do not commit or redistribute without reviewing Hunter Water's current terms.
logos.notes: Maintain clear space equal to the width of 'HU'. The guide does not state a numeric minimum width.

logos.asset_variant: CMYK coated primary logo in True Green
logos.minimum_size_exception: Compact identification in the company header is intentionally below the partner-toolkit print minimum; obtain approval or use the no-logo build for external distribution.
logos.redistribution: Cached locally; nib requires approval of content using the toolkit before publication.
logos.copyright_notice: nib name and logo are owned by nib Group.
logos.notes: Keep clear space equal to the width of the letter 'i' on every side. The optically balanced 4.7 mm-high company-header treatment is approximately 11.49 mm wide and is not represented as compliant with the toolkit's 25 mm print minimum.

transform.description: 1200 x 1200 rasterisation of the exact official SVG; no crop, recolour, or aspect-ratio change.

logos.minimum_size_exception: Compact identification in the University company header is intentionally below the published square-mark minimum; obtain approval or use the no-logo build for external distribution.
logos.redistribution: Cached locally; the approved asset library is staff-gated and external use should be confirmed with the University.
logos.notes: The public brand-identity guidance sets a 40 mm minimum for the square mark. The requested alternative/restricted-space horizontal artwork is only available through the staff-gated approved asset library, so no unauthoritative third-party substitute is cached. The live official asset was Cloudflare-protected during setup, so an Internet Archive capture dated 2026-07-04 is pinned. The optically balanced 5.3 mm company-header treatment is a documented compact-layout exception, not a claim of brand compliance; obtain approval or use the no-logo build before external distribution.
